flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at West Virginia University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.3k → $28.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at West Virginia University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Virginia University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at West Virginia University are 30% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($55.9k vs $43.0k).
